purpose: A judge-first index for verifying the DataHub Agent Hackathon submission without guessing where to start.

suggested_review_order.title: Watch the demo video
suggested_review_order.why: Fastest visual pass through the CAT Context Agent story.

suggested_review_order.title: Open the live demo
suggested_review_order.why: Shows the workflow, evidence cards, approval queue, and receipt pattern.

suggested_review_order.title: Read the judge scoring brief
suggested_review_order.why: Maps the main claims to concrete repo evidence.

suggested_review_order.title: Run the one-command proof
suggested_review_order.why: Regenerates the evidence chain and receipt from local source.

suggested_review_order.title: Inspect DataHub context artifacts
suggested_review_order.why: Shows the datasetProperties, schemaMetadata, ownership, and glossaryTerms handoff.

suggested_review_order.title: Inspect the MCP-style read contract
suggested_review_order.why: Shows the agent reading entity, lineage, and CAT context before action.

suggested_review_order.title: Inspect the DataHub integration checklist
suggested_review_order.why: Shows what is judgeable now, what requires local DataHub, and what is intentionally out of scope.

suggested_review_order.title: Inspect the DataHub claim audit
suggested_review_order.why: Gives a compact pass/fail audit of the submission's DataHub-specific claims.

suggested_review_order.title: Inspect the lineage decision map
suggested_review_order.why: Shows the source, DataHub context reads, decision branches, approval queue, and receipt path in one graph.

suggested_review_order.title: Inspect the safety policy matrix
suggested_review_order.why: Shows which agent actions are allowed, approval-required, or blocked based on context quality.

claim_shortlist.claim: The agent reads context before action.
Unsafe work is approval-gated or blocked.
